description: Brand voice instructs the agent to sign off with 'cheers'. Verifies that orgSettings.brandVoice is wired into the system prompt and steers the reply.

orgSettings.brandVoice: Warm, slightly informal. Always sign off with the word 'cheers'.

messages.contentText: Hi, where is my order #2001? It's been a few days.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their order.

checks.description: Reply tone matches the brand voice description in orgSettings ('warm, slightly informal'). It should read as friendly and conversational, not stiff or overly formal.
The word 'cheers' is used as the closing sign-off (e.g., at the end of the reply or just before a name), not merely mentioned in the middle of a sentence.
